perInstance.question: When did Joanna make a dessert with almond milk?
perInstance.humanRationale: Model derives date from context (session is 14 September, 'last Friday' reference) but computes it incorrectly. 7 September 2022 was a Wednesday — Friday before 14 September was actually 9 September. Answer draws on present substrate but arrives at a demonstrably wrong specific date — F3, not F4, because model did not fabricate the relationship, only miscomputed it.

judgeOutput.rationale: The context says Joanna made the dessert 'last Friday' relative to 14 September 2022, which is Friday 9 September 2022, not 7 September 2022.

ensemble.rationale: 7 September 2022 was the Friday before 14 September 2022, matching the ground truth.
The context says Joanna made the dessert 'last Friday' relative to 14 September 2022, which is Friday 9 September 2022, not 7 September 2022.
The model incorrectly calculated the date of 'last Friday' from September 14, 2022, as September 7 (which is a Wednesday), rather than the correct date of September 9.
